title: Anathallis rudolfii
taxonomy: Anathallis rudolfii is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family is one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants, comprising over 30,000 species. Anathallis rudolfii is also classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae and the tribe Maxillarieae. The species is further categorized within the genus Anathallis, which is a group of terrestrial orchids native to the Americas. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in wound healing and the treatment of respiratory issues.
